result.summary: Found 3 issues: text truncation in navigation, cut-off game cards on the right side, and potential horizontal overflow issues affecting content visibility.

issues.description: Navigation tab 'Hot Gar' is truncated - text appears incomplete, likely should read 'Hot Games'
issues.suggestion: Ensure all navigation items have sufficient width to display complete text, or implement text overflow handling such as ellipsis or text wrapping

issues.description: Rightmost game cards in 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are partially cut off/not fully visible on the right edge
issues.suggestion: Adjust the carousel or grid layout to ensure all game cards are fully visible, or implement a proper scrolling mechanism for the game cards

issues.description: Rightmost game card in 'Top Played New Games' section is cut off, with partial game title visible
issues.suggestion: Review the responsive design breakpoints and ensure game cards are properly contained within the viewport with appropriate padding and overflow handling
